concerns.text: T011 and T012 both marked [P] but write to SAME file `code/01_data_ingestion.py`. Not parallel-safe — concurrent edits will cause merge conflicts. [P] tag is incorrect.
T017 and T018 both marked [P] but write to SAME file `code/02_preprocessing.py`. Not parallel-safe. [P] tag is incorrect.
T037, T038, T039 all marked [P] but write to SAME file `code/04_visualization.py`. Not parallel-safe. [P] tag is incorrect.
Test tasks marked [P] alongside implementation tasks they validate. Tests cannot run until implementation completes — violates producer-before-consumer ordering. [P] tag is incorrect.
T023 marked [P] but T024-T034 depend on it being created first. Cannot implement lag window analysis (T024) before correlation script (T023) exists. [P] tag is incorrect.
T041 marked [P] but T042-T044 depend on it being created first. Cannot implement sensitivity reporting (T042-T044) before script (T041) exists. [P] tag is incorrect.
